title: Chicken soup is coming!
description:
这是来自中国的一个梗，纯属是我一时兴起做出来的数据包。
This is a meme from China, which is a data pack made by me on a whim.
body:
该数据包添加了鸡汤，你可以使用红蘑菇、棕蘑菇、生鸡肉和碗来合成它。当你食用它的时候，你的身体~~会发生奇妙的化学反应~~。
Chicken soup is added to the data pack, and you can use red mushroom, brown mushroom, raw chicken and bowl to craft it.When you eat it, your body will ~~have wonderful chemical reactions~~.
